message:
feat(mission-loop): add per-recipient handoff contracts to conflict messages

Refactor generate_conflict_messages() to include structured handoff
contracts personalized for each recipient based on their role in the
conflict resolution:

- AutoResolved: winner gets retain_assignment, loser gets
  yield_assignment, observers get observe_resolution
- Deferred: all participants get hold_and_retry
- PendingManualResolution: all get await_manual_resolution

Each message body now includes a **Handoff contract** block with role,
action, thread_id, and continuity instructions. The body is generated
inside the per-recipient loop so each agent receives a personalized
message instead of a generic notification.

New handoff_contract_for_recipient() function returns (role, action,
continuity) tuples.

2 new tests: auto-resolved role assignments, manual resolution actions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
